violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. Beef stored in container without lid.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed build up of grease on grill.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelves in cooking area were not cleaned as frequent as needed.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of hood and filters observed to have a build up of grease.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls in cooking area contained a build up of grease and debris.
Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Farm fresh eggs in cooler.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Meat stored directly on floor in cooler.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Stove, pizza cooker, deep fryer not under ventilation hood system.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Around cooking equipment and floors need cleaning.
